entity.summary: United Kingdom-founded digital payments and crypto account platform operating since 2014, combining crypto and fiat exchange functions with cards, accounts, savings, and stablecoin payment infrastructure.
entity.notes: The frozen queue retains the CEX classification, but Wirex is primarily a payments and crypto-finance app rather than a conventional standalone order-book exchange.

expected.summary: United Kingdom-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Wirex Exchange brand.

changes.summary: United Kingdom-founded digital payments and crypto account platform operating since 2014, combining crypto and fiat exchange functions with cards, accounts, savings, and stablecoin payment infrastructure.
changes.notes: The frozen queue retains the CEX classification, but Wirex is primarily a payments and crypto-finance app rather than a conventional standalone order-book exchange.

events.title: Wirex platform lineage began in 2014
events.description: Wirex records its platform and company history as beginning in 2014 in London.
events.notes: The reviewed official source establishes the year but not an exact launch day.

evidence.title: Wirex App personal platform
evidence.notes: The official page states that Wirex has operated since 2014 and describes the current consumer platform.

evidence.title: Wirex official platform
evidence.notes: Official domain confirming current payments, account, card, stablecoin, and crypto services.
